Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class FieldServiceSettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.MetadataForSettings
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.FieldServiceSettings
public class FieldServiceSettings extends MetadataForSettings

Java class for FieldServiceSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="FieldServiceSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}MetadataForSettings">
       <sequence>
         <element name="apptAssistantExpiration" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="apptAssistantInfoUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="apptAssistantRadiusUnitValue" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ApptAssistantRadiusUnit" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="apptAssistantRadiusValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="apptAssistantStatus" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="canPopulateGoogleAddress" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="canSendAppCenterCrashReports" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="canStoreMobileAnalytics" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="deepLinkPublicSecurityKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="doesAllowEditSaForCrew" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="doesShareSaParentWoWithAr" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="doesShareSaWithAr" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableBatchWindow" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableFloatingWorkOrder" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enablePopulateWorkOrderAddress" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableWorkOrders" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableWorkPlansAutoGeneration" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableWorkStepManualStatusUpdate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="fieldServiceNotificationsOrgPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="fieldServiceOrgPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isGeoCodeSyncEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isLocationHistoryEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="mobileFeedbackEmails" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="o2EngineEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="objectMappingItem" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}ObjectMappingItem" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="optimizationServiceAccess" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="serviceAppointmentsDueDateOffsetOrgValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="workOrderDurationSource" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}WorkOrderDurationSource" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="workOrderLineItemSearchFields" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="workOrderSearchFields" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getObjectMappingItem

      public List<ObjectMappingItem> getObjectMappingItem()
      Gets the value of the objectMappingItem property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the objectMappingItem property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getObjectMappingItem().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list ObjectMappingItem

      Returns:
      The value of the objectMappingItem property.

    • isOptimizationServiceAccess

      public Boolean isOptimizationServiceAccess()
      Gets the value of the optimizationServiceAccess property.
      Returns:
      possible object is Boolean

    • setOptimizationServiceAccess

      Sets the value of the optimizationServiceAccess property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is Boolean

    • getWorkOrderLineItemSearchFields

      public List<String> getWorkOrderLineItemSearchFields()
      Gets the value of the workOrderLineItemSearchFields property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the workOrderLineItemSearchFields property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getWorkOrderLineItemSearchFields().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list String

      Returns:
      The value of the workOrderLineItemSearchFields property.

    • getWorkOrderSearchFields

      public List<String> getWorkOrderSearchFields()
      Gets the value of the workOrderSearchFields property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the workOrderSearchFields property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getWorkOrderSearchFields().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list String

      Returns:
      The value of the workOrderSearchFields property.
